# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

# Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Frontend improvement
- [ ] Community onboarding
- [ ] Safe learning resource
- [ ] Maintenance

# Testing

Describe how you checked the change.

# Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials or private links are included.
- [ ] No unauthorized testing instructions are included.
- [ ] The change is appropriate for public open-source review.
- [ ] Beginner-facing content is clear and respectful.
